transcript.text:
1st, 2nd, 3rd gen!
(Ran the business for 50 years!)
Guys, do you know who this lady is?
Isn't she the singer, Tzuyang?
(20) She's "Tzunyang" who eats 30 ramyun noodles
Right! Tzunyang!
Oh my, what an honor!
(The generations gathered for today!)
(We'll need more food) One more stir-fried rice
(Here comes extra stir-fried rice)
(Looking yummy)
(Thumbs up for good food)
(Thumbs up for you too)
(We introduce you to an old restaurant today)
Hi guys!
I'm at Seongbuk-gu today

I visited a very old!
Chinese restaurant ran for 50 years and still ongoing
(Seems like a busy rest day though...) It's their off day
but apparently the owner is doing something special
so here I am!
("Yesnal Junggugjib"(Old Chinese House), Seongbuk-dong, Seongbuk-gu) Wow, it does seem very old!
Oh, hello!
Oh my gosh!
(The owner has been waiting for Tzuyang to arrive) I absolutely love Tzuyang
- I'm your big fan - Oh really?
Hello
It's supposed to be your off day
- Today is "Jjajang Day" - "Jjajang Day"?
(It's a day when they offer seniors jjajangmyeon for free held once every month) You're giving jjajangmyeon to seniors for free?
They love it
(They've been showing good deed for over a decade) It's been around 12, 13 years or so

You're doing such a great thing
(Q. What made you start volunteering for the seniors?) Hello!
(The owner couple who ran the business for 50 years) It'll be 50 years next year
I'm turning 80 next year as well
(Oh Chun-geun 79 / Kim Myung-sook 76) I'm 76! Kim Myung-sook!
We used to live poor back in the days
so we got a lot of help from our neighbors
(Wanted to return as much as they got) "Since we've been doing well, it's time to return the favor to the seniors"
That's why we started
(Even on their off days, they go to the hospital)
(We don't think of it as a special deed) It's something anyone can do
It's only once a month
While you're here, you should have a very strenuous volunteering session
Lady, here's your apron
(Offers Tzuyang the pretty apron) I'll let you put on an apron
Thank you!

This is so pretty
(Starting from 11 a.m.)
(It's Jjajang Day for the seniors residing in Seongbuk-gu) Welcome!
We're here to have jjajangmyeon
Everyone! This lady here is!
Tzuyang! She's popular! The best in the nation
(Let's clap first) Really gotta give it up for her
(For those who visited, we wish you nothing but happiness) All the guests today are lucky! You'll flourish!
- We had very difficult times financially - Yes, very
- We sold tteokbokki, donuts - Donuts, yes
(Went through very hard times running various businesses) Sweet potato, corn, hotteok, you name it
We've literally ran the restaurant business for everything
(Settled by the name "Yetbunsik" in 1974) Then we thought we're better off selling jjajangmyeon
There were a lot of kids without financial support
We've offered scholarships a few times
(Started helping out students who needed financial support as they made money) We offered a lot more for others over us

I believe that's what's helping us make ends meet
It's hard to try it out
Once you do that, you keep on going
(Even prepared yogurt and rice cakes for dessert to offer)
It must be hard for the seniors to visit
but they come to eat our food, so we're more grateful and happier
I guess all the customers who had a lot of our food brought luck for me
I'm rich! I'm rich in terms of my filled heart
Would you like me to cut it?
Are you okay?
Tell me if you want more!
Who offers free food these days?
Once every month!
Thank you
Tzuyang!
Yeah!

Thanks for the meal
Sis, where are you?
Her name is Tzuyang! The #1 in the world!
Don't you know what mukbang is?
She finishes this much amount of food!
What?
What an honor! There's a lady like that here?
Hey, how about we...
Since they're going through so much to feed us jjajangmyeon in this hot weather,
let's clap for them!
Everyone here
Thanks for the meal!
They've been volunteering for 30 years!
These people could even live without law
They aren't making enough profit after giving this much food
I'm really thankful for what they're doing

They've been known for a long time!
They offer a lot of good deeds
They're offering this kind of service!
We're so grateful for that
(We learn the warmth of the world thanks to you)
It's for them!
Where's the one with extra noodles?
- Not the one with extra noodles - Right here!
(It's already noon)
(As more customers continue to enter,)
(had to refill the jjajang sauce)
(Time to promote for the new set of customers) So!
(Time to promote for the new set of customers) Do you know who this lady is?
It's Tzuyang who eats 20 ramyun noodles!
She's famous worldwide!
She's so popular! You don't get to see her very often!

Isn't Tzuyang a singer?
(No, she does mukbang!) That gorgeous lady over there
(The number of noodles is increasing...) She's the... one with 30 noodles...
(Hi, it's Tzunyang) She's "Tzunyang"
Yeah, she's Tzunyang! She eats a lot of food
Hmm, but it's only us who are eating...
Would you like to eat anything?
Me? I'm craving jjajangmyeon the most...
Jjajangmyeon for sure
- Because I noticed - Yeah
- Gotta eat what's available since it's your off day! - I can cook everything!
Anything's possible! I'm your fan
- I gotta cook whatever you want! - Oh, really?
(It's time to wrap up)
(Expert vibes)
- Where did you learn that from? - Tell me about it

Not anyone can pull this off
(Drooling)
Sit here! You must be hungry
I've been famished for a long time
(End of business) Thanks for your hard work today!
(Special thanks to the members of the women's association for volunteering with us!) We'll get going first
(Special thanks to the members of the women's association for volunteering with us!) Thanks for your work
(Photo time) Please take a good photo of us
(Sneak)
You too?
(Let's take it together) He's taking a photo with us! Take your mask off
I was only going to eat their jjajangmyeon
but they say their tangsuyuk and kkanpunggi is also good
- I'm the tangsuyuk master, so that's a must! - Okay
(It's not optional! It's a must) I must have tangsuyuk?
- In that case... - Yes

Jjajangmyeon, samseon jjamppong, mini tangsuyuk,
kkansho shrimp, kkanpunggi,
and one stir-fried rice?
That sounds good!
(I knew she's a mukbanger) One more delicious order of stir-fried rice!
(A meal prepared by the entire family)
(Tangsuyuk - A must-have menu)
(Kkanpunggi without ketchup)
(Amazing visuals) Wow, these are looking amazing!
I just need to get my jjajang and jjamppong
(For those who will visit - Please understand them!) It says, "The chefs are relatively old"
"You might have to wait for a bit for your food"
"but please do not rush them"
Wow, thank you!
Wow, looks good!
(Hearty) Look at the portion!

They say the tangsuyuk is really good
A place known for tangsuyuk
(Who are you...?) Wow, I've never had anything like this!
Even the sauce is so good
It's so good!
(Samseon jjamppong full of seafood)
Wow, thank you! I should...
- It's hot! - Thank you
Look at that portion too!
Feel free to ask for more
Order more!
Thank you so much for the food!
- Enjoy your food - Thank you!
Looks so good! Thank you for the food
I tried their tangsuyuk
and it's something I've never had in the past

It tastes like tangsuyuk but looks like guo bao rou
The batter is very fluffy
(Tender! Crispy outside, juicy inside) And the pork inside is very tender
The sauce is amazing too!
(It's packed full of meat!)
So yummy
Not only they offer good deeds,
they offer amazing food too!
(The one who made her drool) I've been craving this jjajangmyeon for a long time!
(Here to check out how much she had) It's so nice to see you enjoying your food
It's so thick!
The black bean sauce is so thick!
Wow, looks good!
(Finally taking a bite)
So good
We only use the best ingredients

- Even the flour used for the sauce is the most expensive one - Really?
That's why I didn't smell the flour!
(Watching)
It's so good! Seriously!
This is kkansho shrimp
- I remember you saying you don't like ketchup - Right! I can't eat ketchup
(Knew what she had to do! Very quick-witted) That's why you didn't add ketchup!
Thank you
It has this color because there's no ketchup
Wow, it's so good
(So big) Wow, the shrimps are big
It's still really good without ketchup!
I've only been seeing you on YouTube
It feels like a dream now that you're eating in front of me
I think I'm dreaming too! The food is so yummy
It's so good!

(Gotta try and dig in!) One more
The color of the jjamppong soup is really rich
Whoa, look at this thin layer that formed
The jjamppong is so thick!
It looks so good
(Let's try the soup first)
Ooh, it's good!
Wow, the soup tastes so deep and rich
It's so deep and rich as if I had beef bone soup
So good!
Change the position!
I knew the restaurant of 50 years is special
It's so good!
There's both small octopus
and webfoot octopus
It's fresh!

I'm sure it'll taste good with stir-fried rice
I can see why it's samseon! It's full of seafood
(Full of fresh seafood)
What's this insane pair?
The rice is crazy good too
It's so smoky!
Wow, it's so perfectly smoky!
(Wow, it's so fun to watch!)
They told me this kkanpunggi is spicy!
I like how it's boneless
It's nothing but juicy pork
The sticky rice inside the batter is so chewy
so it goes really well with chicken
(Homemade plum juice) Thank you! Is this plum?
I tried this before and it was so good!
The plum is so!

I gotta eat it like this
(It's time to dig in)
The soup is really
One more tangsuyuk
It's so good
(Digging in with an apron on her)
I kept my apron on until now
It's pretty! And it looks like a skirt on you, Tzuyang!
(Tell me it looks like a dress) Right? Doesn't it look like a dress?
(Knows Tzuyang very well) Tzuyang always spills food whenever she wears white clothes!
True!
(Why is it already gone?) What? There's only 2 left!
I forgot my jjajangmyeon
It's probably all soggy by now...
Nah, I can still eat it!
It's not soggy!

(Finished the jjajang)
But...
It's completely different than the jjajang I've seen earlier!
(That's all we have left) That's the leftover...
It's actually the leftover, I'm sorry...
- It's the leftover jjajang? - This is all we have left after serving everything
(I'm sorry) The jjajang we served tastes better
- Oh, that's better? - Yeah...
(At least I get to try it) But I get to have one for myself!
How fortunate!
I both pour and dip the sauce
I just dig in
(Found something)
(Tzuyang being Tzuyang again)
It's not Tzuyang if her clothes are clean!
Gotta eat this first

(Taking a photo) (Pouring sikhye)
I want to show my son!
(Kimchi!)
My mouth is packed full of food! Haha
- Sikhye - Wow, thank you!
The sikhye is so rich!
I tried it before and it was so amazing
It's the best!
It's so good!
(Put jjajang sauce on it)
(and finish the stir-fried rice)
The last kkanpunggi
(Finished the meal)
Your cooking skill is amazing!
I had such a wonderful meal
We should serve some watermelons at least since we have a precious guest

This place is full of warmth
Thank you so much! I appreciate your offer
I'll just try one!
(Oopsies!)
(I'll offer some to the owners first!) Where are my manners
- Oh my - We have plenty over there!
I, I forgot!
It's just that I go crazy when I see food...
I'll take a slice! It's such an honor!
No, no! It's me who got the food
The watermelon is so good!
I learned so many valuable lessons today
It's amazing to see you doing good deeds
I think you're so amazing to the point that I feel grateful for it
(Tzuyang prepared a gift for the owners who always offer things for others) Oh, by the way,
- although this isn't much... - Oh my...

Wow, it says it's beef!
It's Korean beef
You do so many good things
so I thought it would make it even better if you get something like this
- Thank you - You even have a kind heart
- Thank you - Let's live 20 years more
(Be healthy and happy for a longer time!) Thanks for the food!
Thanks for the food
(Q. Are there any wishes or plans in the future?)
As for the wish, I want to sustain this life and stay healthy
I want to volunteer for the seniors, at least until my body allows me
I believe as long as you put your heart to whatever you do,
you can be successful in any field that you're in
- Bye! - Thanks for the hard work today, bye!
(The warmth you provide warms the world, thank you)
